scored_papers.title: Tracing complex zeros of the quantum survival amplitude: How the energy distribution controls dynamical phase transitions
scored_papers.abstract: We analyze the zeros of the complex-time survival (Loschmidt) amplitude in finite quantum systems and develop a general framework for their approximation based on the stability of zeros of holomorphic functions.
scored_papers.reason: ⏱️ Loschmidt 生存振幅の複素零点を初期状態のエネルギー分布で支配する解析枠組み。時間-エネルギー双対性が見通し良く整理される ✨
scored_papers.summary: 📊 零点の大域構造はエネルギー分布の包絡で決まり、優勢成分由来の周期零点鎖で構成。DQPT を energy spread から論じる

scored_papers.title: Uncertainty Principles and Maximum Entropic Force
scored_papers.abstract: We consider quantum gravity corrections to the maximum entropic force that arise from several gravitational uncertainty principles (GUP/EUP/GEUP/LQGUP).
scored_papers.reason: 🌀 GUP/EUP/GEUP/LQGUP を比較した量子重力補正カタログ。空間-運動量側の不確定性原理の俯瞰として有用 📚
scored_papers.summary: 🧲 修正最大エントロピー力が各 UP パラメタで違う形に。MOND 様補正や Tsallis 熱力学との接続も議論 🔭

scored_papers.title: Kochen-Specker nonlocal hidden variables must include time-ordering to allow for measurement independence of several agents
scored_papers.abstract: We consider an ontology in which contextual nonlocal hidden variables are stored as pre-existing possibilities, and show that context must include time-ordering of agent choices.
scored_papers.reason: ⌚ 隠れ変数モデルが measurement independence を保つには time-ordering を context に含める必要あり、と論証 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 📐 Bell 実験での複数 agent 構成で、spacelike/timelike を問わず choice の time order を context に含めないと矛盾 💭

scored_papers.title: Unlocking vacuum entanglement
scored_papers.abstract: The structure of entanglement in the ground state of the harmonic chain is studied. A class of two-mode squeezed states, useful for this purpose, is identified.
scored_papers.reason: 🎵 harmonic chain 基底の two-mode squeezed states を活用!squeezed coherent states の応用範囲を拡げる材料 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🔓 中央モード測定 + 通信で両端モードのエンタングルメントを解錠。元々ゼロでも引き出せる条件を提示 💫

scored_papers.title: Commutativity from a single Bargmann invariant equality
scored_papers.abstract: We provide a universal necessary and sufficient condition for pairwise commutativity of quantum states: they commute iff tr(ρ1² ρ2²) = tr(ρ1 ρ2 ρ1 ρ2).
scored_papers.reason: 🧮 状態の可換性を Bargmann 不変量ひとつの等式で判定!観測量-状態双対の数理的整理に効く一品 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 📏 ρ1,ρ2 が交換 ⇔ tr(ρ1²ρ2²)=tr(ρ1ρ2ρ1ρ2)。qubit では purity と overlap の polynomial に簡約 🎯

scored_papers.title: Finite-time memory detectors and fully constraining Faddeev-Kulish dressings in QED and gravity
scored_papers.abstract: Finite-time Faddeev-Kulish dressings can be fully constrained by symmetry, recovering classical memory effects. Finite-time Fock spaces and memory detectors are constructed.
scored_papers.reason: ⏳ 有限時間の Faddeev-Kulish 衣 + memory detector!asymptotic state を有限時間版に置換する波束的議論と接続 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🌐 対称性で衣の選択が一意化、有限時間 Fock 空間で gravitational memory と Christodoulou 高次寄与を再構成 💫
